description: Style NoteAdd a sophisticated polish to your minimalist look this season with this lucera ring. Styled to refine your ensemble, don't save it just for the special dates - wear this with your denim and tee staples too. Up the style bar with this trendy piece and style it with tonal accessories.   Product DetailsSlim silver band with two interlooping arcs with white stone embellishmentHeart shaped central insetMaterial and CareSilver, CZ diamondsWipe with a cotton swab to remove dust
